headline: Max erupts for +3 — but James holds the top at 52.0.
sub: James leads on 52.0, 16 clear of Rob. The day belonged to Max (+3), fueled by Belgium knocking out Joe's United States in the Round of 16. Teddy (+3) also climbed. Out of the tournament: Portugal (Nick), United States (Joe). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
